$comment: Shared, tracked project settings for claude-kit. Local-only overrides go in settings.local.json. autoMemoryDirectory points the harness auto-memory at the git-tracked repo memory/ lane so memory commits and syncs across machines/surfaces (PLAN.md Part 5; see memory/README.md). The SessionStart hook is the Part 0.3 sync: git pull --ff-only on fresh start, surfacing divergence before work (non-fatal). Commit-time auto-push is enforced by the keep-tracker-current rule (Claude Code does not fire agent post-commit hooks). Project hooks/settings are honored after the per-machine workspace-trust dialog.

hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" && git pull --ff-only 2>&1 || echo '[claude-kit sync] pull not fast-forward or offline — check git status before work (PLAN Part 0.3 / 8.2).'
